name: hint
title: BTHint
description: Notification indicator atom. Renders as a solid red dot (no count) or a red pill/circle containing a count value. Numbers > 99 are displayed as "99+". Three sizes: lg (dot 16px / badge 24px), md (dot 10px / badge 16px), sm (dot 8px / badge 16px with smaller font).

files.content:
export { default as BTHint } from './BTHint.vue';
export type { BTHintProps, BTHintSize } from './BTHint.types';
